metadata.description: Argus — JVM diagnostic toolkit. The harness skill turns the CLI into an AI-assisted continuous JVM monitoring + optimization + troubleshooting flow inside Claude Code.

plugins.name: argus-jvm-harness
plugins.description: Continuous JVM monitoring + optimization + troubleshooting. Wraps the Argus CLI's harness command and summarises its findings in natural language. Bootstraps the CLI via the official install.sh if it is not already on PATH.
